product.name: PULUZ Portable Photo Studio Light Box, 16x16 inch Professional Dimmable Shooting Tent Kit Soft Box with 480pcs LEDs Lights 4 Backdrops for Jewelry and Small Product Photography Props Upgrade 16 inch
features: 【Stepless Dimming & High CRI】 Integrate 480 high-quality LED Light Beads with Dimmable Range 1%-100%, You can easily adjust the brightness to get the desired lighting effect. High Color Rendering Index (95+) and no strobe and glare, create brighter and softer lights, help leave your photos looking more natural and great texture

【4 Color Backdrops】The photo box comes with 4 color detachable backgrounds(White/Black/ Orange/Green), made of thicker PVC, which are sturdy enough, waterproof and no wrinkles, so you can easily change background colors and build up various shooting scenes as needs

【Advanced Photography】Upgrade design of the shooting box mainly solves the shadow problem that cannot be solved by studio shooting, and this photography box can easily solve it, it also can be used as a softbox. Extra provided inner Light Diffuser, which is the best practice for fixing the problem of products’ highly reflecting light and performing more details of the contours. Not only for junior photographers, but also for advanced photographers and professionals

【Multi-Angle Shooting】Support overhead and frontal shooting, the front panel also has a dedicated photographic window which reduce the influence of outside light, showing the beauty and details of the subject from different perspectives

【Easy to Assemble】The photography box Dimension is 16*16 inch. With particular folding design, the whole assembly of portable light panel box ONLY needs 10 seconds. No additional tools are required for installation and uninstallation. No complicated lighting layout. With a durable and waterproof carry bag, it’s very compact and convenient to use in many places without taking a lot of spaces

【What You Get】: 1x Photo studio box, 3 x LED light board (480pcs LED beads total), 4 x backdrops with 4 colors(Black, White, Orange, Green ), 1 x Front baffle door, 1x Soft Cloth, 1x Carry Bag , 1x Power supply with US plug, 1x Manual. PULUZ worry-free 12 months warranty and lifetime quality warranty
